StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(cn.name) AS from_company, MIN(mc.note) AS production_note, MIN(t.title) AS movie_based_on_book FROM job.company_name AS cn, job.company_type AS ct, job.keyword AS k, job.link_type AS lt, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.movie_link AS ml, job.title AS t WHERE cn.country_code !='[pl]' AND (cn.name LIKE '20th Century Fox%' OR cn.name LIKE 'Twentieth Century Fox%') AND ct.kind != 'production companies' AND ct.kind IS NOT NULL AND k.keyword IN ('sequel', 'revenge', 'based-on-novel') AND mc.note IS NOT NULL AND t.production_year > 1950 AND lt.id = ml.link_type_id AND ml.movie_id = t.id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mk.keyword_id = k.id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND mc.company_type_id = ct.id AND mc.company_id = cn.id AND ml.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND ml.movie_id = mc.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mc.movie_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: [dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] IS NOT NULL AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1027],[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[movie_id] as [mc].[movie_id]) AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1028],[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[company_type_id] as [mc].[company_type_id])

([dbprove].[job].[company_name].[name] as [cn].[name] like '20th Century Fox%' OR [dbprove].[job].[company_name].[name] as [cn].[name] like 'Twentieth Century Fox%') AND [dbprove].[job].[company_name].[country_code] as [cn].[country_code]<>'[pl]'
